methodology: Manual source-code audit of templates, handlers, routing, and service calls per subject. GT reflects 'what a user can do' — actual user-visible interaction sites, not framework-internal bindings.

gt.notes: App-shell nav. HeaderComponent composed by AppComponent (root), not route-activated.

labelEvidence.text: Not a fan of this post

gt.notes: User card nav. Composed into UserListComponent and UserSearchComponent.
Heroes: add mode. Emits add output.
Hero edit button (same A1 trigger as GT-09).
Villain delete/edit/cancel/save buttons (same widget, different output bindings).

outOfScope.reason: Two-way data binding, not a user-visible trigger. A1 should not emit WTH for ngModel.

outOfScope.pattern: Output event bindings (save/unselect/deleted/selected/add/refresh) on child component tags in HeroesComponent/VillainsComponent templates
outOfScope.reason: These are EventEmitter bindings on child component selectors, not user-visible triggers. The actual user trigger is the button inside the child component.

outOfScope.pattern: router-link (plain HTML attribute) on HeaderBarBrandComponent and ListHeaderComponent
outOfScope.reason: Not Angular [routerLink] directive. Plain HTML attribute with no Angular routing behavior.

gt.notes: Dialog close button. Found via COMPONENT_COMPOSES_COMPONENT composition chain from route-activated components.
Dialog close button. Found via COMPONENT_COMPOSES_COMPONENT composition chain from route-activated components.

outOfScope.pattern: matTreeNodeToggle directive on QualityModelComponent composite node button
outOfScope.reason: CDK directive toggle — no explicit (click) handler, pure CDK internal action.

outOfScope.pattern: [(ngModel)] or reactive form inputs without explicit event handlers in MetadataFormComponent
outOfScope.reason: Data binding, not user trigger. A1 should not emit WTH for implicit ngModel/form bindings.

outOfScope.pattern: Output event bindings (metadataSubmitted/goalsSelected) on child component tags in QualityAssessmentComponent
outOfScope.reason: EventEmitter output bindings — fired as consequence of child component actions, not independent user triggers.

gt.notes: Logout div (text). CSS class 'hide' may be display:none.
Dialog close. Found as bootstrap component (not route-activated, not composed, but declared with outgoing widget edges).
Dialog close. Found as bootstrap component (not route-activated, not composed, but declared with outgoing widget edges).
Logout routerLink on span (dual-trigger with GT-06 click).
Logout routerLink on div (dual-trigger with GT-07 click).

outOfScope.pattern: [(ngModel)] on UpdateProductComponent form fields (input, select, textarea)
outOfScope.reason: Two-way data binding, not user-visible triggers.

gt.notes: Add visit form. Missing CNR to /owners/:id (async callback).

outOfScope.pattern: ngModel and reactive form [formControl] bindings with no explicit handler
outOfScope.reason: Form data binding, not user triggers.

knownIssues.issue: VisitAddComponent WSF missing CNR to /owners/:id (navigation in async callback not captured).

knownIssues.note: S-LOG handlers (log→logToServer) are network telemetry, NOT purely diagnostic. 20 S-LOG entries are genuine GT.

gt.notes: Sidebar hamburger. Entry route but sidebar triggers may not be extracted (relative routerLink gap).

knownIssues.note: No CCS or CNR in any reachable trigger's effect closure. All service calls are in unreachable child route components.
